_comment: Backend base URL for /api/* calls. Empty string = same-origin (local server.py on :5001). Filled at deploy time with the Cloud Run URL so Vercel-hosted frontend can hit it cross-origin.
_auth_comment: When the backend has TAKI_AUTH_TOKEN set, supply a default_key here OR the user passes ?key=<token> in the URL. Frontend appends it to /api/* requests automatically.
